title: Device and method for training a machine learning system for denoising an input signal
abstract: Computer-implemented method for training a machine learning system (8) to denoise a provided input signal (S), wherein training the machine learning (8) system comprises the steps of: â¢ Providing a first input signal (1) and a first value (2) to a first part (4) of the machine learning system (8), wherein the first input signal (1) characterizes a noisy signal; â¢ Determining, by the first part (4), a first output signal (9) for the first input signal (1) and the first value (2); â¢ Determining, by a second part (5) of the machine learning system (8), a second value (6) based on the first output signal (9), wherein the second value (6) characterizes a probability of the first output signal (9) to characterize a noisy signal; â¢ Determining, by the second part (5), a third value (7) based on a supplied second input signal (3), wherein the second input signal (3) characterizes a non-noisy signal and wherein the third value (7) characterizes a probability of the second input signal (3) to characterize a non-noisy signal; â¢ Training the machine learning system (8), wherein training comprises: - Adapting a plurality of parameters of the first part (4) according to a gradient of the second value (6) with respect to the plurality of parameters of the first part (4); - Adapting a plurality of parameters of the second part (5) according to a gradient of a sum of the second value (6) and the third value (7) with respect to the plurality of parameters of the second part (5).
